Hey, what's going on everyone? Welcome to Gym Launch Lead Generation. And so this is kind of the overview of what lead generation is, just from a 1000 foot standpoint. I say aka rain making. And I say that because this will become your newest, most valuable skill. So how much money you make is directly proportional to the level of skill you have. If you are more skilled at something that makes more money than what you are making, then you would do that skill and then you would be compensated that new level. And with what you'd be making at a new level, could pay someone to do the thing that you were doing before. And that's ultimately how you continue to level up as an entrepreneur is by acquiring newer and more valuable skills. So like some of you should already know this like first year training, which you can pay someone $15 an hour for once you learn how to sell. And all of a sudden you can in an hour you can make $500 and then cover all the training sessions for an afternoon for an entire week. And so in that hour, you're able to generate more value and then buy your time back. The next more most valuable skill above sales is going to be making it rain, generating increase, generating demand. And so that's what lead generation is all about. And that's from the external marketplace as well as internal, meaning if you can get customers to refer other members that still counts. But this is the subject matter of this module will be how to take eyeballs externally, pay for the ad placements and turn those eyeballs into clicks, into conversions, into paying customers. So that's what we're going to be going over in this section. This is the thing that most of you who signed up paid for is to learn how to have this skill and never be reliant on another company again to make it rain for yourself. So this is it. This is what you were waiting for. And let's dig in.
